description: Letter in Hebrew. Dating: Late, perhaps 16th century. Conveying regulations for merchants (?תקנת סוחרים) in the name of the heads of the congregation. On verso, a validation from a higher authority (with a seal imprint). Signed by Efrayim(?) b. [...]. Needs further examination. Information in part from FGP.
description_he: מכתב בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
